prompt: i want to make a short film from scratch — like a cinematic ad for our luxury watch brand 'Chronos'. think James Bond meets tech. concept: a mysterious figure in a dark suit walks through a rain-soaked Tokyo street at night, glances at their wrist, and time seems to freeze around them. neon reflections everywhere. about 45 seconds, 6 scenes. use Seedance for the video generation.
assertions: Selects FILM mode (not COPY or CREATE)
Reads references/film-mode.md for the detailed workflow
Follows FILM pipeline: concept -> screenplay -> characters -> scene breakdown -> images -> videos -> stitch
